description: COUNT(column) is always non-nullable regardless of column nullability

columns.name: cnt
columns.note: COUNT never returns NULL, even when counting a nullable column

name: count_column_non_null
query_sql:
-- @name CountUsersWithBio
-- @returns :one
SELECT COUNT(bio) AS cnt FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
